minimal_context: The student is waiting during a transition period at the end of a lesson while the teacher gives instructions to traffic guards.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We are at the end of the lesson. Students on traffic guard duty, please get ready.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits at her desk, as she does not have traffic duty.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: I am going to give the traffic guards their instructions now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Waits while the instructions are being given.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: The rest of you, please wait for your final instructions.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Jumps out of her seat to get something from her backpack.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We are at the end of the lesson. Students on traffic guard duty, please get ready.

STUDENT: (Sits at her desk, as she does not have traffic duty.)

TUTOR: I am going to give the traffic guards their instructions now.

STUDENT: (Waits while the instructions are being given.)

TUTOR: The rest of you, please wait for your final instructions.

STUDENT: (Jumps out of her seat to get something from her backpack.)

task.content: Transition period at the end of a lesson where some students are preparing for traffic guard duty and others are receiving final instructions

context.social_setting: Whole class setting with teacher giving instructions to multiple students

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When needing to get something from her backpack during a transition period
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Jumps out of her seat to get something from her backpack

behavior_patterns.condition: When scolded harshly by the teacher
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Blushes and quickly takes her seat
